scripts.clean: nx reset && pnpm clean:generated && rm -rf lookups/build pushfold/target liuran/.svelte-kit liuran/build
scripts.ci:local: pnpm build && pnpm check && pnpm lint && pnpm test:cpp && pnpm test:rust && pnpm -C liuran test:unit --run --passWithNoTests && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:cpp: cmake -S lookups -B lookups/build && cmake --build lookups/build --target pushfold_lookups_tests && ctest --test-dir lookups/build --output-on-failure
